rows.notes: Selected from gemini-flash, as it correctly identifies '1805' as the first chronological header for the ledger entries.

rows.description: - 23 Mr Tauntons Bill /23.13.1/ paid by Order, with 30-
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's transcription of description and amounts (39 | 9 | 0.5). Pounds is '39', shillings '9', and pence column shows a dash with a clear half-penny symbol. Gpt-5-mini appears to have confused the '30-' in the description text with the pounds amount, and missed the half-penny.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of Mr. Taunton's bill, paid by order, amounting to £39 9s 0.5d.
